name: Pork Tenderloin w/ Bleu Cheese Bacon Whipped Potatoes & Dri
recipeInstructions:
1. For the Sauce: Combine cherries, wine, demi-glace, salt, and pepper in a small saucepan. Simmer over low heat until heated through, stirring frequently.
2. For The Tenderloin: Season tenderloins with salt and pepper. Grill over medium-low coals until cooked through, turning occasionally. Slice each tenderloin into 10 medallions.
3. For The Potatoes: Cook potatoes in water in a saucepan until tender; drain. Beat with an electric mixer until fluffy. Add butter, cream, cheese, bacon, salt, and pepper, beating until well mixed.
4. To Assemble: Spoon a mound of potatoes in the center of each serving plate. Fan the pork medallions around the potatoes. Spoon sauce over the pork.
